name: aws-sagemaker-toolkit
description: AWS ML infrastructure assets across EC2 (self-managed) / HyperPod (semi-managed) / SageMaker (fully-managed) tiers — platform selection, SageMaker deep-dive, E2E fine-tuning generator (interview → HF model/data → synthetic → training → endpoint → Bedrock/Strands/AgentCore agentic), hands-on lab code, plus author/verify/lab-code subagents. Korean-first, fact-verified, tier-misattribution-guarded.
